postmark.Subject: Purchase — David Okafor and Jennifer Tran (82% LTV)
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Non-spousal joint purchase: David Okafor and Jennifer Tran buying 52 Winston Churchill Boulevard, Mississauga, ON L5M 4Y1 as business partners (50/50 title). Purchase price $900k, loan amount $738k (82% LTV).

Combined income $285k. Both NOAs attached. Lender wants additional collateral conversation given the elevated LTV.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
